title: White and Silver Snowflake Tissue Paper Sheet Gift Wrapping,Topeedy 50 Sheets 35 * 50cm Snowflake Tissue Paper for Packing Xmas Present Weeding Birthday Gift Boxes or DIY Art Crafts-Snowflake
features: ❄【Package include】You will receive a package containing 50pcs Christmas white tissue paper sheets with silver snowflake pattern.

🎁【High quality】These silver snowflake tissue papers are soft and easy to cut and fold. You can cut them into any shape and size you want. At the same time, the raw materials of paper are environmentally friendly, recyclable and reusable.
❄【Dimension】The size of each piece of tissue paper is 35cm*50cm, which is very suitable for packaging small gifts and will not cause too much waste.

🎁【Wide application】You can not only use this white tissue paper with silver snowflake to wrap Christmas birthday weeding gifts, fill gift boxes, wrap flowers or books, but also draw and write on it with colorful pens to make your gifts more special. You can even use this white tissue paper sheet as a shooting prop. How creative!
❄【Customer service】If you are not satisfied with our products or have any questions, please feel free to contact us.
description: Description： Whether it is a star or a Christmas tree, these two patterns are very suitable for Christmas gift packaging in the near future. It is absolutely perfect to wrap your gifts for friends and family with this exquisite pattern of tissue paper.
